response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-04:05: Performance of 'ray' by Oozora Subaru. Song identified from on-screen text. 2. 04:05-04:06: Transition. 3. 04:06-05:01: Performance of 'シルエット' by Oozora Subaru, Sakura Miko, and Ookami Mio. Song identified from on-screen text. 4. Searched for 'ray BUMP OF CHICKEN lyrics' and 'シルエット KANA-BOON 歌詞'. Found lyrics for both.
response.global_summary: This video features a live performance from the "#大空スバル7周年LIVE". It begins with a performance of "ray" by BUMP OF CHICKEN, followed by a performance of "Silhouette" by KANA-BOON, featuring Oozora Subaru, Sakura Miko, and Ookami Mio.

scenes.description: A performance of the song 'ray' by Oozora Subaru on a digital stage. The background screen displays '#大空スバル7周年LIVE'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
お別れしたのはもっと前のことだったような
悲しい光は封じ込めて踵すり減らしたんだ
君といた時は見えた 今は見えなくなった
透明な彗星をぼんやりとでもそれだけ探している
しょっちゅう唄を歌ったよ その時だけのメロディーを
寂しくなんか無かったよ ちゃんと寂しくなれたから
いつまでどこまでなんて 正常か異常かなんて
考える暇も無い程 歩くのは大変だ
楽しい方がずっといいよ ごまかして笑っていくよ
大丈夫だ あの痛みは忘れたって消えやしない
理想で創った道を 現実が塗り替えていくよ
思い出はその軌跡の上で 輝きになって残っている
お別れしたのは何で 何のためだったんだろうな
悲しい光が僕の影を 前に長く伸ばしている
時々熱が出るよ 時間がある時眠るよ
夢だと解るその中で 君と会ってからまた行こう
晴天とはほど遠い 終わらない暗闇にも
星を思い浮かべたなら すぐ銀河の中だ
あまり泣かなくなっても 靴を新しくしても
大丈夫だ あの痛みは忘れたって消えやしない
伝えたかった事がきっとあったんだろうな
恐らくありきたりなんだろうけど こんなにも
お別れした事は 出会った事と繋がっている
あの透明な彗星は 透明だから無くならない
◯×△どれかなんて 皆と比べてどうかなんて
確かめる間も無い程 生きるのは最高だ
あまり泣かなくなっても ごまかして笑っていくよ
大丈夫だ あの痛みは忘れたって消えやしない
大丈夫だ この光の始まりには 君がいる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Parting was something that happened a long time ago,
I locked away the sad light and wore down my heels
When I was with you, I could see it, now I can no longer see it
I am still searching for that transparent comet, even if only vaguely
I sang songs all the time, melodies for just that moment
I wasn't lonely, because I was able to be lonely properly
Until when? To where? Is it normal or abnormal?
Life is so hard that I don't even have time to think about such things
It's much better to have fun, I'll keep laughing while bluffing
It's okay, that pain won't disappear even if I forget it
The reality is painting over the path I created with ideals
The memories remain as radiance on those tracks
Why did we part? For what reason was it?
The sad light stretches my shadow far ahead
Sometimes I get a fever, when I have time I sleep
In that dream where I know it's a dream, I'll meet you and then go again
Even in the endless darkness, far from a clear sky
If I imagine the stars, I'm already in the galaxy
Even if I don't cry much anymore, or even if I get new shoes
It's okay, that pain won't disappear even if I forget it
There must have been something I wanted to tell you
It's probably commonplace, but even so
The fact that we parted is connected to the fact that we met
That transparent comet doesn't disappear because it's transparent
Round, cross, triangle, which is it? How do I compare to everyone else?
Life is the best, to the point that I don't have time to verify it
Even if I don't cry much anymore, I'll keep laughing while bluffing
It's okay, that pain won't disappear even if I forget it
It's okay, you are at the beginning of this light

scenes.description: A performance of 'Silhouette' by Oozora Subaru, Sakura Miko, and Ookami Mio on the stage. Text '作詞・作曲: 谷口鮪' appears.
scenes.performer_in_video: Oozora Subaru, Sakura Miko, Ookami Mio
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
いっせーのーせで踏み込むゴールライン
僕らは何も何もまだ知らぬ
一線を越えて振り返るともうない
僕らは何も何もまだ知らぬ
うだってうだってうだってく
煌めく汗がこぼれるのさ
覚えてないこともたくさんあっただろう
誰も彼もシルエット
大事にしてたもの 忘れたふりをしたんだよ
何もないよ笑えるさ
いっせーのーで思い出す少年
僕らは何もかもを欲しがった
わかってるって あぁ気づいてるって
時計の針は日々は止まらない
奪って奪って奪ってく 流れる時と記憶
遠く遠く遠くになって
覚えてないこともたくさんあっただろう
誰も彼もシルエット
恐れてやまぬこと 知らないふりをしたんだよ
何もないよ笑えるさ
ひらりとひらりと舞ってる
木の葉のように揺れることなく
焦燥なく過ごしていたいよ
覚えてないこともたくさんあったけど
きっとずっと変わらないものがあることを
教えてくれたあなたは消えぬ消えぬシルエット
大事にしたいもの持って大人になるんだ
どんな時も離さずに守り続けよう
そしたらいつの日にか 何もかもを笑えるさ
ひらりとひらり舞ってる 木の葉が飛んでいく
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
At the count of three, we step onto the goal line
We don't know anything, nothing at all yet
Once we cross the line and look back, it's already gone
We don't know anything, nothing at all yet
It's overflowing, overflowing, overflowing
The shimmering sweat is spilling over
There were probably many things we didn't remember
Everyone and anyone is a silhouette
I pretended to have forgotten the things I held dear
There's nothing, I can laugh it off
At the count of three, I remember the boy I was
We wanted everything, everything
I know, ah, I've noticed it
The hands of the clock do not stop, the days do not stop
It's stealing, stealing, stealing away, the flowing time and memories
It becomes far, far, far away
There were probably many things we didn't remember
Everyone and anyone is a silhouette
I pretended not to know the things I fear most
There's nothing, I can laugh it off
Fluttering, fluttering, it's dancing
Like leaves, I want to spend my time without worry, without frustration
There were many things I didn't remember, but
I am sure there are things that will never change
You taught me, you are a silhouette that will never fade, never fade
I'll become an adult while holding onto the things I want to treasure
Let's keep protecting them without letting go, no matter what happens
Then someday,
I'll be able to laugh at everything
Fluttering, fluttering, the leaves are flying away
